messages.className: min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&]:mt-1
messages.text:
cycle108_official_source_adapter_9pro_packet.zip
Zip Archive
You are one of nine independent theorem workers attacking the RS-MCA / Proximity

Prize M1 upper-side route. You have a context packet with the current canonical

tracker, Cycle106 and Cycle107 audits, selected Cycle107 role returns, source

extracts, q-ledger material, and auxiliary F1/L1/L2/X1 notes.


No Internet. Use only the attached context and your own reasoning.


Try to fully solve the problem. If you cannot fully solve it, progress it as

much as possible. Take all the time you need. Use MAX reasoning. Do not give a

polished vague essay. Give a theorem, counterexample mechanism, exact wall, or

checker/certificate target.


The active target is:


L-CYCLE108-OFFICIAL-RESIDUAL-SLOPE-PARTITION-INJECTIVE-NORMALIZATION-AND-AP-DESCENT


Prove or refute:


Every official residual bad slope in the M1 upper-side source problem is either

charged to a banked quotient/periodic/contained/tangent/endpoint/field-ledger

branch, or assigned injectively to a polynomial-size tagged normalization chart

whose activity is an endpoint-corrected complement-line or equivalent

AP-corrected Gate B object. The number of tags/charts must be polynomial in n,

with exponent independent of s and k. The official corrected-reserve

aperiodicity predicate must descend to the AP_corr or rank-escape hypothesis

consumed by Gate B.


You must preserve the exact claim labels:


PROOF

COUNTERPACKET

BANKABLE_LEMMA

ROUTE_CUT

EXACT_NEW_WALL

AUDIT

PLAN


Do you see a route to a full solve? If yes, what is the next exact lemma or

construction? If no, identify the first exact reduction line where the theorem

fails and give the precise counterexample mechanism.


Do not claim prize-level progress unless you have the full official source

adapter, q-field transfer, and numerator bound. Finite/model certificates are

not prize proofs. A model counterpacket is not a source-valid counterpacket

unless it is embedded in the official above-reserve source problem and all

charges are paid.


Before finalizing, do a self-audit.


Explicitly answer:


1. What exact implication did I prove, and what exact implication did I not prove?

2. Is the result official-prize-relevant, or only a finite/model/research certificate?

3. What is the first line in the reduction chain where the theorem could fail?

4. Are q_gen, q_line, q_code, q_chal, and the 2^-128 target being used correctly?

5. Could quotient/periodic structure, contained incidences, same-slope collisions,

   tangent supports, endpoint terms, high-denominator branches, or affine color

   normalization reduce the claimed numerator?

6. If my answer is a PLAN, what exact theorem/checker/counterpacket would

   convert it into PROOF or COUNTERPACKET?


Do not hide behind broad language. Give the exact next lemma, exact missing

hypothesis, or exact counterexample mechanism. # Role 05 - Endpoint / Interior Formalizer

Use the Cycle107 endpoint-corrected duality result.

Produce a clean theorem statement separating:

endpoint objects
interior complement-line objects
low-denominator objects
balanced arbitrary-anchor objects
high-denominator objects

Prove the endpoint charge exactly. Then state the interior complement-line
theorem in a form that can be consumed by the official source adapter without
off-by-one, endpoint, or degree convention ambiguity.

If possible, give a finite checker specification for the endpoint correction and
for the source-to-interior-object partition.
Show more

messages.text: IвАЩll reconstruct the Cycle107 endpoint-corrected duality and official source-adapter chain, then test the source partition and aperiodicity descent to identify the first unproved obstruction or next exact lemma.

messages.text: The endpoint charge now looks source-level: full support s=n gives at most one official bad slope, with the d=n correction only confirming consistency.

messages.className: min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&]:mt-1
messages.text: After removing endpoint cases, the interior partition is by intrinsic denominator degree: low residual-list, balanced arbitrary-anchor cloud, and high transverse affine-plane incidence. The remaining quantitative bottleneck is low-list charging or polynomial M√ґbius-jet coverage of the balanced cloud.

Exact-shell reduction

Let z have a noncontained witness on T, with вИ£TвИ£вЙ•a. Suppose every a-subset of T were contained. Since a>k, each degree-<k explanation on an a-subset is unique.

Adjacent a-subsets intersect in

aвИТ1=k+ѕГвИТ1вЙ•k

points, so their degree-<k explanations agree. Connectivity of the Johnson graph on the a-subsets of T glues these explanations to a simultaneous explanation of f and g on all of T, contradicting noncontainment. Hence some exact a-subset remains noncontained.

Endpoint charge

When a=n, the only possible support is D. Agreement of f+zg with a codeword on all of D is

ѕА(f)+zѕА(g)=0.

If ѕА(g)=0, this forces ѕА(f)=0, so both words are codewords and noncontainment fails. If ѕА(g)

5. Could the listed structures reduce the numerator?

Yes, but only with the following exact discipline.

Same-slope witness collisions always contribute one.

Literal whole-coset support swaps can force the same slope and add zero.

Periodic U-stabilizers can generate distinct slope orbits and are not zero-cost.

A contained witness does not remove a slope that also has a transverse witness.

Tangent configurations require their separate O(n)-scale charge.

Source endpoint contributes at most one.

High denominator gives at most one slope per support, but not a polynomial number of supports.

A global affine normalization ќЄ=ќ±z+ќ≤, ќ±
оА†
=0, preserves cardinality exactly.

Support-dependent affine normalizations can collapse slopes unless the chart tag is retained.

Subfield confinement can reduce the numerator to a subfield-sized set, but only under its actual B-valued hypotheses.

6. What would convert this into PROOF or COUNTERPACKET?

PROOF requires L-CYCLE108-INTERIOR-STRATIFIED-CHARGE-OR-DECORATED-COVER, including the LOW line-image bound, balanced M√ґbius-jet cover, high-plane cover, source-decorated AP descent, exact charge caps, field transfer, and final numerator inequality.

COUNTERPACKET requires an above-reserve official family with all charges paid and either superpolynomial residual slope count, superpolynomial minimum chart-cover number for every transverse support selector, or source-AP-valid decorated objects that systematically fail the Gate B hypothesis.
